note: Cards for apps hosted in OTHER repositories — each renders as a full tile on the grid. Optional screenshots go in portfolio/public/external/ and are referenced as 'external/<file>'. Fields: slug, title, description, repoUrl, demoUrl (the live link the tile opens), tags, status, added, year, role, size ('<cols>x<rows>', each 1-3, default 1x1), accentHue (0-360), accentHue2 (optional 2nd gradient hue), screenshot.

apps.title: Crazy Flashcards
apps.description: Leitner-system flashcards with swipe study, per-day stats and JSON/CSV import-export. Runs fully offline in your browser.

apps.title: CS2 Utility
apps.description: Companion utility app for Counter-Strike 2 — built with Expo, React Native and Supabase.
